attributes.Sql Query:
select     
                SPC.TCIDTE as BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT, 
       SPC.TCMCID as BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID, 
SPC.TCACBR as BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM,
                                SPC.TCINV as BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM, 
                                SPC.TCNPAS as BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT,
                                 SPC.TCSEQN as BK_AMEX_TRAVL_CAR_SEQ_NUM_INT,
          COALESCE(SPC.TCTYPE,'=') as CAR_BOOKING_TYPE_CD,
                                 COALESCE(NACRC.BK_RENTAL_COMPANY_CD,'UNKNOWN') as BK_RENTAL_COMPANY_CODE,
                                SPC.TCPDTE as RENTAL_CAR_PICKUP_DT,
                                SUBSTR(SPC.TCPLOC,10,12) as RENTAL_CAR_PICKUP_LOCATION_CD, 
                                SPC.TCCITY as RENTAL_CAR_COMPANY_CITY_NAME, 
                                SPC.TCSTAT as RENTAL_CAR_STATE_CD,
                                SPC.TCAZIP as RENTAL_CAR_COMPANY_ZIP_CD, 
           COALESCE(SPC.TCPCTY,'UNK') as RENTAL_CAR_COMPANY_CITY_CD,
                                SPC.TCDAY as RENTAL_DAY_CNT,
                                SPC.TCNCAR as RENTAL_CAR_CNT, 
                                COALESCE( NARCT.BK_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CD,'UNK' )  as BK_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CODE,
                                SPC.TCRATE as RENTAL_CAR_RATE_RPRTNG_USD_AMT,
                                SPC.TCOAMT as RENTAL_CAR_RATE_LOCAL_AMT, 
                                SPC.TCCFRM as RENTAL_CAR_CONFIRMATION_NUM, 
                COALESCE ( NISOOC. BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE ,'UNK' )  as LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD,
                                SPC.TCNUMP as RENTAL_CAR_PASSENGER_CNT,
                                 SPC.TCDDTE as RENTAL_CAR_DROP_OFF_DT, 
                                 SPC.TCPNR as AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID,
                                COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,'UNK') as RENTAL_CAR_COUNTRY_CD,
                                 SPC.TCEXRT as CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RATE_AMT ,
COALESCE(NACRC.BK_RENTAL_COMPANY_CD,SPC.TCACDE) as SRC_RPTD_RENTAL_COMPANY_CD,
COALESCE( NARCT.BK_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CD,SPC.TCTCAR )  as SRC_RPTD_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CD,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
  'I' AS DML_TYPE
                                FROM
(
SELECT                                TCIDTE, 
TCMCID, 
TCACBR,
                                TCINV, 
                                TCNPAS, 
                                TCSEQN,
                                TCTYPE, 
                                TCACDE,
                                 TCPDTE,
                                TCPLOC, 
                                TCCITY, 
                                TCSTAT,
                                TCAZIP, 
                                TCPCTY, 
                                TCDAY,
                                TCNCAR, 
                                TCTCAR, 
                                TCRATE,
                                TCOAMT, 
                                TCCFRM, 
                                TCOCUR,
                                TCNUMP, 
                                TCDDTE, 
                                TCPNR,
                                TCCTRY,
                                 TCEXRT 
FROM    $$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_CAR 
UNION
  ALL
SELECT                                TCIDTE, 
TCMCID, 
TCACBR,
                                TCINV, 
                                TCNPAS, 
                                TCSEQN,
                                TCTYPE, 
                                TCACDE,
                                 TCPDTE,
                                TCPLOC, 
                                TCCITY, 
                                TCSTAT,
                                TCAZIP, 
                                TCPCTY, 
                                TCDAY,
                                TCNCAR, 
                                TCTCAR, 
                                TCRATE,
                                TCOAMT, 
                                TCCFRM, 
                                TCOCUR,
                                TCNUMP, 
                                TCDDTE, 
                                TCPNR,
                                TCCTRY,
                                 TCEXRT 
FROM    $$EXCEPDB.EX_POST_TRAVEL_CAR )  SPC
 Inner Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE NATI 
                ON (        NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  SPC.TCINV 
                                and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT      = SPC.TCIDTE
                                and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT = SPC.TCNPAS
                                and NATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM = SPC.TCACBR
                                and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID    = SPC.TCMCID)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_CAR_RENTAL_COMPANY  NACRC 
                ON SPC.TCACDE = NACRC.BK_RENTAL_COMPANY_CD   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCISOC
                ON   (
CASE     WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(SPC.TCCTRY),1,1) BETWEEN '0' 
                AND       '9'
             THEN (CAST(TRIM(SPC.TCCTRY) AS INTEGER))
             
ELSE      0
             
END       )  =  ETCISOC. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
                on ETCISOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE    
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE  NARCT
                ON SPC.TCTCAR = NARCT.BK_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CD      
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NISOOC
                ON  NISOOC. BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE  = SPC.TCOCUR

SELECT BATCH_ID, 
TCIDTE,
		TCMCID, 
		TCACBR, 
		TCINV,
		TCNPAS, 
		TCSEQN, 
		TCTYPE,
		TCACDE, 
		TCPDTE, 
		TCPLOC,
		TCCITY, 
		TCSTAT, 
		TCAZIP,
		TCPCTY, 
		TCDAY, 
		TCNCAR,
		TCTCAR, 
		TCRATE, 
		TCREAS,
		TCCCUR, 
		TCOAMT, 
		TCCFRM,
		TCOCUR, 
		TCNUMP, 
		TCCRTE,
		TCCCOM, 
		TCDDTE, 
		TCPNR,
		TCCTRY,
		 TCTRNR, 
		 TCMPAS,
		TCEXRT, 
		TCFIL1, 
		TCFIL2,
		FK_TRAVEL2, 
		XPK_ROW2, 
		CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		 'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM	
 $$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_CAR SPC
 WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE NATI 
                               WHERE NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  SPC.TCINV 
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT      = SPC.TCIDTE
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT = SPC.TCNPAS
		and NATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM = SPC.TCACBR
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID    = SPC.TCMCID
		)
